keep.reason: More comprehensive naming - 'task_definitions' (plural) is more accurate. Both rules check identical condition (containerDefinitions[].logConfiguration exists).

remove.reason: EXACT DUPLICATE - Both check identical condition (containerDefinitions[].logConfiguration exists). task_definitions_logging_enabled has better naming (plural).

recommendations.description: Merge 2 duplicate rules checking containerDefinitions[].logConfiguration exists. Keep task_definitions_logging_enabled (better naming).
recommendations.impact: Reduces duplicate rules, preserves compliance coverage

recommendations.description: Fix when condition - 'when' clause may not be supported. Should use 'all' conditions to filter settings where name equals defaultLogDriverMode, then check value equals block.
recommendations.impact: Fixes condition evaluation, enables proper filtering

recommendations.description: Verify array iteration syntax containerDefinitions[] works correctly. Test if it properly iterates over all containers and handles 'all containers must meet condition' logic.
recommendations.impact: Ensures array iteration works correctly for container checks

recommendations.description: Enhance validation - currently only checks if secrets exists, but should verify that plaintext secrets are NOT in environment variables. Should check that sensitive data is in secrets array (from Secrets Manager/Parameter Store) rather than in environment array.
recommendations.impact: Improves validation accuracy - ensures secrets are properly managed

recommendations.description: Enhance validation - currently only checks if image exists, but should verify image source verification is actually enabled. Need to check for image verification settings (e.g., ECR image scanning, imageDigest, or specific verification configuration).
recommendations.impact: Improves validation accuracy - ensures image verification is actually configured

recommendations.description: Verify nested field path networkConfiguration.awsvpcConfiguration.assignPublicIp matches emit structure and API response type.
